blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-03-28.
7,565 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
0 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
No questions resolve tomorrow (2026-03-29), but still scan for ones resolving soon (check the resolution_date column in market.csv).

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-27 -> 2026-03-28)

- "Who will say by March 29, 2026 that worship “for all religions” must be guaranteed in Jerusalem after the Palm Sunday access dispute?" → Emmanuel Macron
- "In which country will an Iranian raid kill a worker at a plant that makes electricity and fresh water by 30 March 2026?" → Kuwait
- "What Sudanese state will be named as the place where an aid disruption leaves thousands cut off, in reporting published by March 30, 2026?" → White Nile State

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (330 resolved, 0 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
